verses.text: We want to tell you about the Word that gives life. The one who existed before the world began. This is the one we have heard and have seen with our own eyes. We saw what he did, and our hands touched him 1st John

Yes, Jesus, the one who is life was shown to us. We saw Jesus, and so we can tell others about Jesus. We now tell you about Jesus. Jesus is the eternal life that was with God the Father and was shown to us. 1st John
We are telling you about what we have seen and heard. We want you to have fellowship with us. The fellowship we share together is with God the Father and his Son Jesus Christ 1st John
We write these things to that your joy will be full of joy. 1st John
We heard the true teaching from God. Now we tell it to you: God is light, and in him there is no darkness. 1st John
So if we say that we share in life with God, but we continue living in darkness, we are liars, who don’t follow the truth. 1st John
But if we live in the light as God is in the light. We have fellowship with each other, and the blood of Jesus, God’s Son, washes away every sin and makes us clean. 1st John
If we say we do not have sin, then we deceive ourselves and we do not accept the truth. 1st John
If we say that we have sinned and we confess our sins, then we can be sure that God will forgive our sins and wash away everything that we have done wrong 1st John
If we say we have not sinned, then it means we say that God lies. Then we do not accept what God tells us.

My children, I write these things to you because I do not want you to sin. But if one of you does sin, he can be sure that we have Someone with the Father who asks God to forgive us, and that Person is Jesus Christ, the One who did not sin.
Jesus is the way our sins are taken away. Jesus did not take away only our sins. But Jesus also took away the sins of all the people in the world. 1st john
If we obey what God has told us to do, then we are sure that we know him. 1
If people say they know God, but they don’t do what God says, they lie and they do not accept the truth.
But if people do what God tells them to do, God love is truly working in the. This is how we know that we are living in him.

If people say they belong to God, we must live the way Jesus lived. 1 John 2;7 Dear friends, I am not writing a new command to you. It is the same command that you have had since the beginning. This command is the teaching that you have already heard.
But there is something new about this law. You can see this truth in Jesus and in yourselves. The darkness is passing away, and the true light is already shining.
If people say that they live in the light of God, but they hate other believers, then those people still live in the dark.
If people love other believers, then they live in the light and there is nothing in them that will make them do wrong.
If people hate other believers, then they live in the dark. They are like people who walk in the dark and they do not know where they are going because they cannot see in the dark.
I write to you, dear children, because your sins are forgiven through Christ.

I am writing to you fathers, those believers and are spiritually mature, because you know God who has existed from the beginning. I am writing to you, young people, those believers who are growing in spiritual maturity, because you have been victorious and have overcome the evil one. I have written to you, children, those who are new believers, those spiritually immature, because you have come to know the Father. 1 John 2: I have written to you fathers, the mature ones, because you know God who has existed from the beginning. I have written to you, young people, because you are strong, and the word of God remains in you, and you have been victorious over the evil one.
You must not love this sinful world or the things that are in this world. If you love this sinful world, then you do not love the Father.

This is all there is in the world: wanting to please our sinful selves, wanting the sinful things we see, and being too proud of what we have. But none of these comes from the Father. They come from the world.
The world is passing away, and all the things that people want in the world are passing away. But whoever does what God want will live forever. 1John
My dear children, the end is near! You have heard that the antichrist is coming. And now many antichrist are already here. So, we know that the end is near. 1John

These enemies were in our group, but they left us. They did not really belong with us. If they were really part of our group, they would have stayed with us. But they left. This shows that none of them really belonged with us. 1John
But you have an anointing from the Holy, and all of you know. 1John
I write this letter to you, not because you don’t know the truth, but because you know the truth and you know that something that is true now cannot later become a lie. 1John
So who is the liar? It is the one who says Jesus is not the Messiah. He the liar is the antichrist; he is the one who does not believe in the Father or in his Son. 1John
Whoever does not believe in the Son does not have the Father, but whoever accepts the Son has the Father too. 1John
As for you, let what you have heard from the beginning remain in you. If it does, you will also remain in the Son and in the Father. 1John
And this is what the Jesus has promised us, eternal life. 1John
I am writing this letter about those who are trying to lead you into the wrong way. 1John

Remember that Jesus has anointed you with the Holy Spirit and the Holy Spirit is in you. That is why you do not need other people to teach you. Jesus has anointed you with the Holy Spirit and the Holy Spirit teaches you everything that you must know. He speaks the truth, and He does not lie. He teaches you to live with Jesus and you must do that. 1John
Yes, my dear children, live in him. If we do this, we can be without fear on the day when Christ comes again. We will not need to hide and be ashamed when he comes. 1John
You know that Christ always did what was right. So you know that all those who do what is right are God’s children.

3.source: Drafted from the public-domain King James Version in the simple-English style of this Bible.

verses.text: Look at how great the Father's love is! He loves us so much that we are called God's children — and that is what we are! The world does not understand us, because it did not know God.
Dear friends, we are God's children now. We do not yet know exactly what we will be. But we know that when Christ appears, we will be like him, because we will see him as he really is.
Everyone who has this hope keeps himself pure, just as Christ is pure.
Everyone who keeps on sinning breaks God's law; in fact, sin is breaking the law.
You know that Christ came to take away our sins. And there is no sin in Christ.
No one who lives in Christ keeps on sinning. Anyone who keeps on sinning has not really seen Christ or known him.
Dear children, do not let anyone fool you. The person who does what is right is good, just as Christ is good.
The person who keeps on sinning belongs to the devil, because the devil has been sinning from the beginning. But the Son of God came to destroy the devil's work.
No one who is a child of God keeps on sinning, because God's life stays in him. He cannot keep on sinning, because he is born of God.
This is how you can tell God's children from the devil's children: anyone who does not do what is right is not from God, and neither is anyone who does not love his brother or sister.
This is the message you heard from the beginning: we should love one another.
Do not be like Cain, who belonged to the evil one and killed his brother. And why did Cain kill him? Because Cain's own actions were evil, and his brother's actions were good.
So do not be surprised, brothers and sisters, if the world hates you.
We know that we have passed from death to life, because we love each other. Anyone who does not love is still in death.
Anyone who hates a brother or sister is a murderer, and you know that no murderer has eternal life in him.
This is how we know what love is: Jesus gave his life for us. So we also should give our lives for our brothers and sisters.
Suppose someone has enough to live on, and sees a brother or sister in need, but shows no pity. How can the love of God be in that person?
Dear children, let us not love only with words and talk. Let us love by what we do, in truth.
This is how we know we belong to the truth, and how we can set our hearts at rest in God's presence:
even if our hearts make us feel guilty, God is greater than our hearts, and he knows everything.
Dear friends, if our hearts do not make us feel guilty, then we can come to God with confidence.
And we receive from God whatever we ask, because we obey his commands and do what pleases him.
And this is his command: to believe in the name of his Son, Jesus Christ, and to love one another, just as he commanded us.
Those who obey his commands live in God, and God lives in them. This is how we know that God lives in us: by the Spirit he gave us.
Dear friends, do not believe everyone who claims to speak by the Spirit. You must test them to see if the spirit they have comes from God. For there are many false prophets in the world.
This is how you can recognize God’s Spirit. When people say they believe that Jesus is the Christ who really came to the world and became a Man, then they have the Spirit of God in them

But people who say they don’t believe that Jesus Christ really became a Man do not have the Spirit of God in them. They have the spirit of the antichrist in them. They have told you that the antichrist will come. But I tell you: He is already here in the world.
My dear children, you belong to God, you have already defeated these false prophets. That’s because God is in you is greater than the one who is in the world.
The false prophets are people of this world. That is why the false prophets speak like the people of this world and the people of this world do what the false prophets tell them.

We are the children of God and everyone who knows God listen to what we say. Everyone who is not a child of God does not listen to what we say. This is how we know the Spirit that is true and the spirit that is false.
You that are loved of God, we must love each other because love comes from God. Everyone who loves other people is a child of God and knows God.
People who do not love other people do not know God, because God is love.
God showed us how much He loves us when God gave his only Son to come to the world. God’s Son came to give us eternal life.
True love is God’s love for us, not our love for God. He sent his Son as the way to take away our sins.
You that are loved of God, God has shown us how much He loves us, so now we must also love each other.
No person has ever seen God. If we love each other, then God lives with us and we are full of his love.
We know that we live with God and that He lives with us because He has given his Spirit to us.
We have seen and now we tell other people that the Father has sent his Son so that his Son can be the Saviour of the world.
If people say they believe that Jesus is the Son of God, then God is with them, and they are with God.
We have seen God’s love and we believe that God loves us. God is love and everyone who loves other people lives with God and God lives with him.
If God’s love is made perfect in us, we can be without fear on the day when God judges the world. We will be without fear, because in this world we are like Jesus
Where God’s love is, there is no fear, because God’s perfect love takes away fear. (Fear has to do with punishment) God’s love is not made perfect in the one who is afraid.
We love God, because God first loved us.
If we say we love God but hate any of our brothers or sisters in God’s family, we are liars. If we don’t love someone we have seen, how can we love God? We have never even seen him.
God has told us that if we love Him, we must also love the other believers.

5.source: Drafted from the public-domain King James Version in the simple-English style of this Bible.

verses.text: Everyone who believes that Jesus is the Christ is a child of God. And everyone who loves the Father also loves the Father's children.
This is how we know that we love God's children: when we love God and obey his commands.
Loving God means obeying his commands. And his commands are not too hard,
because everyone who is a child of God wins against the world. The victory that wins against the world is our faith.
Who is it that wins against the world? Only the person who believes that Jesus is the Son of God.
Jesus Christ is the one who came by water and blood. He did not come by water only, but by water and blood. And the Spirit is the one who tells us this is true, because the Spirit is the truth.
For there are three that tell us the truth in heaven: the Father, the Word, and the Holy Spirit; and these three are one.
And there are three that tell us the truth on earth: the Spirit, the water, and the blood; and these three agree.
We accept what people tell us, but what God tells us is greater. And this is what God has told us about his Son.
Whoever believes in the Son of God has this truth in his heart. Whoever does not believe God has called God a liar, because he has not believed what God said about his Son.
And this is what God said: God has given us eternal life, and this life is in his Son.
Whoever has the Son has life. Whoever does not have the Son of God does not have life.
I write these things to you who believe in the name of the Son of God, so that you may know that you have eternal life.
This is the confidence we have when we come to God: if we ask for anything that agrees with what he wants, he hears us.
And if we know that he hears us whenever we ask, then we know that we already have what we asked from him.

If you see a brother or sister sinning, but it is not a sin that leads to death, then pray, and God will give that person life. I mean those whose sin does not lead to death. There is a sin that leads to death; I am not saying you should pray about that.
Every wrong thing is sin, but there is sin that does not lead to death.
We know that no one who is a child of God keeps on sinning. The Son of God keeps them safe, and the evil one cannot touch them.
We know that we belong to God, and that the whole world is under the control of the evil one.

And we know that the Son of God has come and has given us understanding, so that we may know the true God. And we are in the true God, because we are in his Son, Jesus Christ. He is the true God, and he is eternal life.
Dear children, keep yourselves away from idols. Amen.
